title: The Boarwoods & the Tomb of the Talons
description: Nights 1–5. Embernips, werewolves, the Oath, and a black dragon beneath the earth.

title: The Road to Saelish
description: Nights 7–8. An ambush on the highway. A brother found. A brother lost.

title: Saelish
description: Nights 9–10. The city of grief. The Talons' cleansing pool. One night of dreamless sleep.

title: Witches Toll
description: Night 11 onward. A missing Talon sergeant. Fey courts in disarray. The reckoning waits.
